name: APQuest
description: APQuest is a minimal 8bit-era inspired adventure game with grid-like movement.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Hard Mode
options.description: In hard mode, the basic enemy and the final boss will have more health.

options.label: Hammer
options.description: Adds another item to the itempool: The Hammer.

options.label: Extra Starting Chest
options.description: Adds an extra chest in the bottom left, making room for an extra Confetti Cannon.

options.label: Start With One Confetti Cannon
options.description: Start with a confetti cannon already in your inventory.

options.label: Trap Chance
options.description: Percentage chance that any given Confetti Cannon will be replaced by a Math Trap.

options.label: Confetti Explosiveness
options.description: How much confetti each use of a confetti cannon will fire.

options.label: Player Sprite
options.description: The sprite that the player will have.
